messages.content:
rewrite, need to use it on the offer of employment: We are delighted to offer you below position at Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd.. We trust that your experience and skills will be a valuable asset to us. If you accept this offer you will join a cohort of highly trained and experienced domestic and international talents, working within a fast-paced and dedicated team to help educate the future leaders of the world as well as the future backbone of Chinese society.

The following points outline the terms and conditions that we are proposing:

We are thrilled to extend to you an offer of employment with Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd. We firmly believe that your experience and skills will greatly contribute to our organization. By accepting this offer, you will become part of a distinguished team consisting of both domestic and international professionals. Together, we will work diligently in a dynamic environment to educate future global leaders and shape the future of Chinese society.

Outlined below are the terms and conditions of this offer:

rewrite, : We are delighted to offer you below position at Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd… We trust that your experience and skills will be a valuable asset to us. If you accept this offer you will join a cohort of highly trained and experienced domestic and international talents, working within a fast-paced and dedicated team to help educate the future leaders of the world as well as the future backbone of Chinese society.

The following points outline the terms and conditions that we are proposing:

We are pleased to extend to you an exciting opportunity to join Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd. in the position mentioned below. Your expertise and abilities are highly regarded and will be an incredible asset to our team. By accepting this offer, you will become part of a exceptional group of professionals, both local and international, who are experienced and dedicated to educating future global leaders and shaping the future of Chinese society.

Outlined below, you will find the proposed terms and conditions of this offer:

rewrite, need to use it on the offer letter: We are pleased to extend to you an exciting opportunity to join Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd. in the position mentioned below. Your expertise and abilities are highly regarded and will be an incredible asset to our team. By accepting this offer, you will become part of a exceptional group of professionals, both local and international, who are experienced and dedicated to educating future global leaders and shaping the future of Chinese society.

Outlined below, you will find the proposed terms and conditions of this offer:

Dear [Candidate's Name],

We are delighted to present you with an exceptional opportunity to join Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd. in the role of [Position]. Your esteemed expertise and remarkable abilities are highly valued, making you a valuable addition to our team. By accepting this offer, you will become an integral part of a distinguished group of professionals, comprising both local and international talents. Together, we are committed to nurturing future global leaders and molding the future of Chinese society.

Outlined below, you will find the proposed terms and conditions of this offer:

Dear [Candidate's Name],

We are delighted to present you with an exceptional opportunity to join Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd. in the role of [Position]. Your esteemed expertise and remarkable abilities are highly valued, making you a valuable addition to our team. By accepting this offer, you will become an integral part of a distinguished group of professionals, comprising both local and international talents. Together, we are committed to nurturing future global leaders and molding the future of Chinese society.

Outlined below, you will find the proposed terms and conditions of this offer:

1. All stated monetary figures are gross amounts (before tax) and will be paid to you in monthly deposits in Chinese RMB.

** Note 2:

Please rest assured that all the documents you submitted are genuine and valid. Upon joining, you agree to comply with the job criteria set by our kindergarten. Failure to meet any of the following circumstances will be considered invalid, and the kindergarten reserves the right not to sign the employment contract or to terminate it immediately:
1) Providing false application information or onboard documents;
2) Serious violations of professional ethics are discovered;
3) Failing to provide the required materials for onboarding within the specified dates or not onboarding on the specified onboard date mentioned above;
4) The above-mentioned position has been canceled or adjusted due to changes in the company's business and staffing plans.

To accept this offer, please reply to us within 3 days. If we do not hear back from you by 12:00 a.m. on 2nd June 2023, the offer will automatically expire, and we will proceed with our alternative candidate. If you have any questions or misunderstandings about this offer, please feel free to contact the HR department at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team and embarking on a rewarding journey together.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten Co., Ltd.
rewrite : You may be expected to work beyond these hours and on weekends if necessary
Occasionally, you may be required to work beyond these hours and on weekends, if the situation demands.
rewrite in an Employment contract style : You may be expected to work beyond these hours and on weekends if necessary
As and when required, you may be obligated to work beyond the standard working hours stipulated in this contract, including weekends, if deemed necessary by the company.
rewrite: Letter of Offer of Employment

Employment Offer Letter

[Date]

[Employee Name]
[Employee Address]
[City, State, ZIP]

Dear [Employee Name],

We are pleased to extend to you an offer of employment with [Company Name]. It is with great enthusiasm that we welcome you to join our team as a [Position]. We believe that your skills, experience, and passion align perfectly with our organization's goals and vision.

Position: [Position]
Location: [Company Location]
Start Date: [Start Date]
Salary: [Salary]

Overview of the Offer:
1. Position: You will be joining [Company Name] in the role of [Position]. Your responsibilities will include [brief description of responsibilities].
2. Location: This position is based at [Company Location].
3. Start Date: Your employment with [Company Name] will commence on [Start Date].
4. Salary: You will receive a monthly salary of [Salary] before tax deductions, payable by bank transfer.

Terms and Conditions:
1. Work Hours: You will be expected to maintain the standard working hours of [X hours per day] and [X days per week]. However, please note that you may be required to work beyond these hours and on weekends if necessary to fulfill your job duties encompassing the needs of the business.
2. Probationary Period: A probationary period of [X months] will apply. During this time, both parties have the right to terminate the employment contract by providing [X weeks] notice or pay in lieu.
3. Terms of Employment: This offer is contingent upon satisfactory completion of background checks and any regulatory requirements. Your employment will be governed by the regulations and policies set forth by [Company Name].
4. Termination: Either party may terminate the employment contract by providing [X weeks] notice or pay in lieu after the probationary period, except for cases of gross misconduct or breach of company policies.
5. Confidentiality: As an employee of [Company Name], you will be required to sign a separate confidentiality agreement to protect the company's proprietary information.

Acceptance and Terms:
1. Acceptance: To accept this offer, please sign and return a copy of this letter by [Acceptance Date].
2. Documentation: Prior to your start date, we kindly request that you provide the necessary documentation, such as identification, employment history, and educational certifications, as part of the onboarding process.
3. Response Deadline: Please respond to this offer within [X days].

We are excited about the prospect of you joining our team at [Company Name]. If you have any questions or require further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to your favorable response and a successful start with our organization.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
[Company Address]
[City, State, ZIP]

rewrite: Dear Mr./Mrs./Ms. XXX, 

Welcome onboard!

We are pleased to inform you that you have passed the interview for the position of Homeroom Teacher. We look forward to working with you to create better future with the kindergarten.
 
3.	Onboard Information：
Onboard Date：23rd August 2023
Location:  
Contact Person： 
   
4.	Visa (Transfer)：
In order to better help you to transfer your current work permit to ours, please provide below documents with colour scan format asap:
(1)	Passport personal page
(2)	Current valid visa page
(3)	Current valid work permit
(4)	Medical check report (validity need to be within 6 months, and need to be done at Guangzhou International Travel Centre, address: 广州市天河区龙口西路207号. Early online appointment is require)
(5)	Release letter issued by current employer
(6)	Cancellation certificate of work permit
(7)	1 blue background visa photo
(8)	Photo receipt 
(9)	Latest Police Registration 

Please sign and return attached offer to us no later by no later by noon of xxxx 2023 (this Friday).

Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us.

Welcome on aboard again and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Dear Mr./Mrs./Ms. XXX,

Welcome aboard!

We are pleased to inform you that you have successfully passed the interview for the position of Homeroom Teacher. We are excited to have you join our team and work together towards creating a better future with the kindergarten.

Here are the details regarding your onboarding:

3. Onboard Information:
Onboard Date: 23rd August 2023
Location: [Specify the location]
Contact Person: [Provide the name and contact details of the designated contact person]

4. Visa (Transfer):
To assist you in smoothly transferring your current work permit to our organization, we kindly request you to provide the following documents in color scan format as soon as possible:

(1) Passport personal page
(2) Current valid visa page
(3) Current valid work permit
(4) Medical check report (validity must be within 6 months and obtained from Guangzhou International Travel Centre, located at 207 Longkou West Road, Tianhe District, Guangzhou. An early online appointment is required.)
(5) Release letter issued by your current employer
(6) Cancellation certificate of work permit
(7) 1 blue background visa photo
(8) Photo receipt
(9) Latest Police Registration

Please review and sign the attached offer letter and return it to us no later than noon on [Date].

If you have any questions or need further clarification, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here to assist you.

Once again, welcome aboard, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
[Company Contact Information]

rewrite： Original document that notarized by the China embassy is required by employee, translation notarization provided by the School
2. 如非中文的，应有中国所在地大使馆的公证及翻译公证
If the certificate is non-Chinese, the document shall be notarized at the China embassy and being translated in Chinese with notarization 
3. 需提供原件及复印件现场复核
Both copy and original are required for checking
4. 所有随行家属均各需要附上关系证明复印件（领馆公证+翻译公证）
All the accompany member(s) need(s) to attach copies of relationship certificate (China Embassy notarized + Translation notarised)

1. The employee is required to provide the original document that has been notarized by the Chinese embassy, along with a notarized translation provided by the School.

2. If the certificate is not in Chinese, it must be notarized at the Chinese embassy and translated into Chinese with notarization.

3. Both the original document and a photocopy are required for on-site verification.

4. For all accompanying family members, copies of the relationship certificate (China Embassy notarized + Translation notarized) must be provided.

rewrite：If either of the party’s passport has renewed, he/she needs to provide old and new passports for checking.

If he/she cannot provide the old passport, extra statement is needed

If either party's passport has been renewed, it is necessary to provide both the old and new passports for verification purposes.

If the individual is unable to provide the old passport, an additional statement explaining the circumstances is required.
PLEASE HELP ME TO WRITE Why do you want to work for Airbnb? *i am applying Talent Enablement Advisor, China (HRBP)

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Talent Enablement Advisor position at Airbnb, specifically for the China region. I have always been drawn to Airbnb's mission and values, and I believe that working for Airbnb would provide a unique and fulfilling professional opportunity.

First and foremost, I am excited about the impact that Airbnb has had on the global travel industry. The concept of connecting travelers with unique and local accommodation options has revolutionized the way people experience and explore new destinations. I am passionate about supporting Airbnb's mission to create a world where anyone can belong anywhere and contribute to the growth and success of such a forward-thinking company.

Furthermore, I am impressed by Airbnb's commitment to diversity and inclusion. I firmly believe that diversity fosters innovation, creativity, and a more inclusive workplace culture. As a Talent Enablement Advisor (HRBP), I am eager to contribute to Airbnb's efforts in promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion within the organization. I am confident that my experience in HR, particularly in talent development and employee engagement, aligns perfectly with Airbnb's values and goals in this area.

Additionally, Airbnb's strong emphasis on employee growth and development is another aspect that appeals to me. The opportunity to work as a Talent Enablement Advisor would allow me to leverage my skills and knowledge in providing strategic HR support to enable employees to thrive and reach their full potential. I am excited about the prospect of collaborating with talented individuals within Airbnb, both locally and globally, to design and implement impactful talent strategies that align with the company's growth objectives.

Lastly, I am attracted to Airbnb's entrepreneurial spirit and fast-paced work environment. The company has consistently demonstrated its ability to adapt and innovate in a rapidly changing industry. I thrive in dynamic environments that encourage creativity, collaboration, and continuous learning. I am confident that my strong problem-solving skills, adaptability, and passion for fostering positive employee experiences align well with the challenges and opportunities that Airbnb presents.

In conclusion, I am genuinely excited about the possibility of joining the Airbnb team as a Talent Enablement Advisor (HRBP) for the China region. I firmly believe that my skills, experiences, and values align well with Airbnb's mission, culture, and commitment to excellence. Working for Airbnb would be an incredible opportunity to contribute to an organization that is not only revolutionizing the travel industry but also making a positive impact on communities worldwide.

Thank you for considering my application. I am eagerly looking forward to the possibility of discussing further how I can contribute to the success of Airbnb.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
